# FTW field-boundary predictions — Pakistan

Country code: PK. Partitions: 20.

Each polygon carries a `confidence` value (0–100): the modeled PRUE confidence sampled at the field's point-on-surface from the 500 m confidence COG (the `predictions/confidence` collection), rescaled `raw / 0.578178 * 100` and clamped to 100 (cells with no data become null). 0.578178 is treated as 100%, matching the FTW inference app; this centroid sample is the closest single value to the app's `confidence_mean`. Recommended default reliability filter: confidence >= 69 (raw 0.4). Confidence reflects cell-level model reliability, not individual-polygon geometric accuracy. Generated by `add_confidence.py` (+ `process_partition.sh`, `run_rails.sh`, `make_pmtiles.py`): https://github.com/fieldsoftheworld/ftw-portolan/blob/main/scripts/add_confidence.py

## Files
- `PK_11.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_11.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_BA.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_BA.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_GB.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_GB.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_GJ.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_GJ.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_HEL.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_HEL.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_IS.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_IS.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_JK.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_JK.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_KAN.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_KAN.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_KHO.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_KHO.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_KP.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_KP.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_LA.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_LA.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_NAN.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_NAN.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_NIM.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_NIM.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_PB.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_PB.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_PIA.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_PIA.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_PKA.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_PKA.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
- `PK_RJ.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_RJ.pmtiles` (vector tiles)

- `PK_ZAB.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `PK_ZAB.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
